---
title: "sampleGenes"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
source("functions.R")
```

```{r}
genes = read_tsv("../output/plotting_data/quality/dna/gene_list.txt", col_names = "gene_id")

gtf <- rtracklayer::import('../data/pig-genome/Sus_scrofa.Sscrofa11.1.115.chr.gtf.gz')

genes_gtf = as.data.frame(gtf) %>% filter(type == "gene") %>% inner_join(genes)

genes_gtf %>% group_by(seqnames) %>% summarise(nGenes = n())
```
